protein_name: Involved in the packaging of pre-mRNA into hnRNP particles, transport of poly(A) mRNA from the nucleus to the cytoplasm and may modulate splice site selection. May bind to specific miRNA hairpins. (Microbial infection) May play a role in HCV RNA replication. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
